scripts.build: rm -rf dist/* && rm -rf build/* && parcel build --no-source-maps --no-content-hash --no-scope-hoist src/index.html && mkdir -p dist/assets/js && cp -r src/assets/icons dist/assets/ && cp -r src/assets/image dist/assets/ && cp src/assets/js/kaiads.v5.min.js dist/assets/js/ && mkdir -p build && (cd dist && zip -r ../build/omap.zip .)
scripts.build-k2: rm -rf dist/* && rm -rf build/* && parcel build --no-source-maps --no-content-hash --no-scope-hoist src/index.html && mkdir -p dist/assets/js && cp -r src/assets/icons dist/assets/ && cp -r src/assets/image dist/assets/ && cp src/assets/js/kaiads.v5.min.js dist/assets/js/ && mkdir -p build && (cd dist && zip -r ../build/omap-k2.zip .)
scripts.web: rm -rf docs/* && parcel build --dist-dir docs --public-url ./ --no-source-maps --no-content-hash src/index.html && cp src/manifest.webmanifest docs && mkdir -p docs/assets/js && mkdir -p docs/assets/image && cp -r src/assets/image docs/assets/ && cp -r src/assets/fonts docs/assets/ && cp -r src/assets/js docs/assets/ && cp -r src/assets/icons docs/assets/ && ./generate_file_list.sh
